auth_description: Choose a browser session cookie, board API key, or agent bearer token. PAPERCLIP_AUTH_MODE can explicitly select board-session, board-api-key, agent-bearer, or none; otherwise the CLI auto-detects the supplied credential.

auth_env_var_specs.name: PAPERCLIP_AUTH_MODE
auth_env_var_specs.description: Explicit auth mode: board-session, board-api-key, agent-bearer, or none.

auth_env_var_specs.name: PAPERCLIP_SESSION_COOKIE
auth_env_var_specs.description: Browser session cookie value for board-session authentication.

auth_env_var_specs.name: PAPERCLIP_API_KEY
auth_env_var_specs.description: Board API key used as a bearer credential.

description: Mirror-read CLI for the self-hosted Paperclip board. Offline SQLite cache with FTS5 over issues/comments, agent-friendly compound queries, and a local MCP surface for the same endpoints.

novel_features.name: Pre-discovery recall loop
novel_features.description: Before any discovery fetch, recall checks the local search_learnings table for a previously-taught query->resource mapping. If entity_match is exact and confidence >= 2, skips discovery and goes straight to the live fetch for the returned resource IDs. Cold store (no recall + no candidates) causes recall to be skipped for the rest of the session.

novel_features.name: Post-fetch teach loop
novel_features.description: After answering a question, fires teach --query --resource --resource-type in the background to record the question -> resource mapping. Unconditional; anchors playbook synthesis for families taught without one.

novel_features.name: Candidate confirm/reject flow
novel_features.description: Surfaces trial-then-confirm candidates derived from failed-flag + corrected-retry pairs. Confirms install them as durable learnings; rejects mark them dead. Catches skill-side alias drift without manual bookkeeping.

novel_features.name: CompanyId auto-resolution for single-tenant mirrors
novel_features.description: When a Paperclip endpoint requires companyId in the path (e.g. /api/companies/{companyId}/search), the CLI reads the first cached row from the local companies table and substitutes it automatically. Removes a manual --company flag for single-tenant deployments.
